text:
But I installed devel/googlest and can't repeat the "gtest" error.

-------
Another thing:
I deinstalled ICU and set BUNDLED_SSL to on. It it installs ICU. LIB_DEPENDS+= libicui18n.so:devel/icu had to wrapped in a conditional or the option had to be removed.
